title: Turkish-Style Croatian Turkey Skillet
description: A flavorful and spicy dish that combines the flavors of Turkey and Croatia. This skillet recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and bell pepper to the skillet. Cook for 5 minutes, until the vegetables are tender.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the ground turkey to the skillet, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add the Croatian paprika, salt, and black pepper to the skillet. Stir to combine.
Continue cooking the turkey until it is browned and cooked through.
Add the skillet seasoning to the skillet and stir to combine.
Serve the turkey mixture hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
